header:
# Terms & Conditions

**Go2Rinjani** — Legal Document  
Effective: 1 January 2026 | Last Updated: May 2026 | Version 2.0


By booking any tour package with Go2Rinjani, you confirm that you have read, understood, and agreed to the following Terms & Conditions in full. These terms constitute a binding agreement between you ("the Client") and Go2Rinjani ("the Company"). Please read carefully before proceeding with your booking.

sections.title: Article 1 — Company Information
sections.content:
Go2Rinjani is a licensed adventure and trekking tour operator based in Lombok, Indonesia, specializing in full-package expeditions to Mount Rinjani (Gunung Rinjani), a UNESCO World Heritage candidate site and the second-highest volcano in Indonesia.

All operations are conducted in compliance with applicable Indonesian tourism law and the regulations set forth by the Rinjani Trekking Management Board (TNGR — Taman Nasional Gunung Rinjani).

**Business Registration Details:**

| Document | Number |
|---|---|
| NIB (Nomor Induk Berusaha) | 2707220027085 |
| NPWP (Nomor Pokok Wajib Pajak) | 65.992.957.4-914.000 |
| PB-PWJA (Perizinan Berusaha Penyediaan Jasa Wisata Alam) | 27072200270850001 |

sections.title: Article 2 — Booking & Reservation
sections.content:
- A booking is considered confirmed only upon receipt of a **20% non-refundable deposit** of the total package price.
- The remaining **80% balance** must be paid in full upon arrival at our designated meeting point, prior to the commencement of the tour.
- Bookings are subject to availability. Go2Rinjani reserves the right to decline any reservation at its discretion.
- A booking confirmation will be sent within **24 hours** of successful deposit payment.
- All bookings must include accurate personal information: full legal name (as per passport/ID), date of birth, nationality, emergency contact, and any relevant medical conditions.

sections.title: Article 3 — Package Inclusions & Exclusions
sections.content:
### Included in Your Package

- Return land transportation from agreed pick-up point to the trailhead
- Licensed, certified, and experienced professional guide(s)
- Porter service (standard weight allocation per person)
- All meals during the trek as specified in the itinerary
- Camping equipment: tent, sleeping bag, trekking poles, and cooking gear
- National Park entrance fee and porter/guide insurance (BPJS)
- Simaksi (official trekking permit issued by TNGR)

### Not Included

- Personal travel insurance *(strongly recommended)*
- Personal trekking gear (boots, clothing, personal medication)
- Alcoholic beverages and personal expenses
- Gratuities/tips for guides and porters *(discretionary)*
- Emergency evacuation costs not covered by personal insurance

sections.title: Article 4 — Health, Fitness & Medical Requirements
sections.content:
Mount Rinjani (3,726 m / 12,224 ft) is a strenuous high-altitude trek requiring a good level of physical fitness. By confirming your booking, you declare that:

- You are in good physical health and fit for high-altitude trekking activities
- You do not have any medical condition that would put yourself or others at risk during the trek
- You have disclosed any pre-existing medical conditions to Go2Rinjani in writing prior to departure
- You accept full personal responsibility for your physical condition during the tour

> **Important:** Go2Rinjani reserves the right to refuse participation or remove any client from the trek if our guide reasonably believes their health or conduct poses a safety risk to themselves or the group. No refund will be issued in such circumstances.

sections.title: Article 5 — Client Responsibilities & Code of Conduct
sections.content:
- Clients must follow all instructions given by the assigned guide at all times during the trek
- Clients must respect the natural environment and adhere to **Leave No Trace** principles
- The collection, removal, or damage of any flora, fauna, rocks, or cultural artifacts within the National Park is strictly prohibited
- Open fires outside designated areas are prohibited
- Clients are required to carry their own valid government-issued ID/passport for park entry verification
- Any behavior deemed disrespectful toward guides, porters, local communities, or fellow trekkers will result in immediate removal from the tour without refund

sections.title: Article 6 — Limitation of Liability
sections.content:
Go2Rinjani acts as an organizer of outdoor adventure activities in a natural environment. By participating in our tours, clients acknowledge and accept that:

- Trekking in volcanic mountain environments carries inherent risks including, but not limited to, altitude sickness, extreme weather, volcanic activity, and physical injury
- Go2Rinjani's liability is limited to the total amount paid for the tour package
- Go2Rinjani is not liable for loss, damage, or injury arising from the client's own negligence, failure to follow instructions, or undisclosed medical conditions
- Go2Rinjani is not responsible for loss or damage to personal belongings during the tour

> We strongly advise all clients to obtain comprehensive travel and medical insurance covering high-altitude trekking and emergency evacuation prior to departure.

sections.title: Article 7 — Itinerary Changes
sections.content:
Go2Rinjani reserves the right to modify or alter any itinerary at any time before or during the tour. Modifications may be necessary due to:

- Adverse weather conditions or natural disasters
- Volcanic alert level changes issued by PVMBG (Indonesian volcano monitoring authority)
- Park closure orders by TNGR or relevant government authorities
- Safety concerns identified by our guide team

In such events, Go2Rinjani will make best efforts to offer an alternative itinerary of equivalent value. Where this is not possible, the Cancellation Policy shall apply.

sections.title: Article 8 — Photography & Media Consent
sections.content:
Go2Rinjani may photograph or film activities during the tour for marketing and promotional purposes. By confirming your booking, you grant Go2Rinjani a non-exclusive, royalty-free license to use such images and footage.

Clients who do not consent must notify us in writing **prior to the tour start date**.

sections.title: Article 9 — Governing Law & Disputes
sections.content: These Terms & Conditions are governed by the laws of the **Republic of Indonesia**. Any disputes arising from or in connection with these terms shall first be attempted to be resolved through good-faith negotiation. If unresolved, disputes shall be submitted to the competent court in **Mataram, West Nusa Tenggara, Indonesia**.

sections.title: Article 10 — Contact Us
sections.content:
For questions regarding these Terms & Conditions, please contact us through the following channels:

| Channel | Details |
|---|---|
| WhatsApp | [+62 819-1603-0378](https://wa.me/6281916030378) |
| Email | [go2rinjani@gmail.com](mailto:go2rinjani@gmail.com) |
| Website | [www.go2rinjani.com](https://go2rinjani.com) |


*Go2Rinjani reserves the right to update these Terms & Conditions at any time without prior notice. The version published on our official website at the time of booking shall be the applicable version.*
